text.title: Claude Tool Use Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for one tool definition + the canonical agent-loop message-trace format.

section.title: Agent-loop trace format
section.code: messages = [ {"role": "user", "content": "..."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": [<text|tool_use>...]} # full content list {"role": "user", "content": [<tool_result>...]} # all tool_use results in one turn ... ]

example.note: Fails: non-identifier name, vague description (<30 chars), input_schema nested >2 levels.

list.item: Trace appends full response.content as assistant turn.
All tool_results for one turn returned in ONE user message.
